sections.short-biography: Ordered to raise troops for Hanzhong camapign but it led to Sun Lang rebelling. With Hu Zhao’s help, drove Lang south.

full_text:
Zhang Gu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Gu. Ordered to raise troops for Hanzhong camapign but it led to Sun Lang rebelling. With Hu Zhao’s help, drove Lang south. Zhang Gu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
